name: Cartegraph Asset Management API
what_it_does: Cartegraph Asset Management REST API for government infrastructure asset management, work order management, and public works operations. Enables AI agents to manage infrastructure asset inventory (roads, bridges, utilities, parks) for government asset lifecycle management, handle work order creation and scheduling for public works operations automation, access pavement condition assessment and maintenance planning for road management, retrieve capital improvement planning and budget forecasting for government infrastructure investment, manage inspection tracking and compliance reporting for asset condition management, handle GIS integration for spatial asset management and field operations, access fleet and equipment management for government vehicle operations, retrieve performance dashboards and KPI reporting for public works management, manage vendor and contract management for public works procurement, and integrate Cartegraph with Tyler Munis, Esri GIS, and public works operations platforms.
use_cases: Managing infrastructure assets from public works agents
Scheduling maintenance from government operations agents
Planning capital improvements from budget planning agents
Tracking inspections from compliance management agents
not_for: Private sector facility management without government context
Small municipalities without dedicated asset management programs
Organizations using IBM Maximo or SAP PM exclusively
best_when: A city, county, or state transportation department using Cartegraph wants AI agents to automate asset condition tracking, maintenance scheduling, work order management, and capital improvement planning.
avoid_when: PUBLIC SAFETY INFRASTRUCTURE RISK: Cartegraph manages public safety infrastructure (roads, bridges, traffic signals) — automated maintenance schedule changes or inspection result recording errors create public safety liability if infrastructure failure occurs. GASB 34 compliance — government infrastructure assets must be reported per GASB Statement 34 (modified approach or depreciation); automated asset management records used for GASB 34 reporting must be accurate and auditable. Davis-Bacon prevailing wage — government infrastructure maintenance contracted work must comply with Davis-Bacon Act; automated work order creation for contracted work must include prevailing wage requirements.

auth.notes: Cartegraph uses API key and OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. Dubuque, Iowa HQ. Founded 1994. Tyler Technologies acquired Cartegraph (2021). Tyler Technologies (TYL NYSE). 600+ city, county, and state government customers. Public works and infrastructure asset management focus. Competes with Lucity and Cityworks for government asset management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual government subscription
pricing.notes: Dubuque, IA. Founded 1994. Tyler Technologies (TYL NYSE) acquired 2021. 600+ government customers. Public works asset management. Competes with Lucity and Cityworks.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; government SLA terms

known_agent_gotchas: PUBLIC SAFETY INFRASTRUCTURE: Automated maintenance scheduling for roads, bridges, and traffic signals must be validated by public works professionals; scheduling errors that result in deferred critical maintenance create public safety liability

GASB 34 reporting accuracy — government infrastructure asset records used for GASB 34 modified approach or depreciation reporting must be accurate; automated condition rating errors create financial statement audit findings

Davis-Bacon prevailing wage — government contracted infrastructure work must comply with Davis-Bacon Act wage requirements; automated work order creation for contracted work must include prevailing wage specifications
No webhooks — work order and inspection event notification requires polling; no native push for work order completion, inspection results, or asset condition changes
GIS coordinate accuracy — infrastructure asset locations depend on accurate GIS coordinates; automated asset creation with incorrect geospatial coordinates creates field worker navigation errors

Tyler Technologies integration dependency — post-acquisition, Cartegraph integration with Tyler Munis ERP and other Tyler products may have changed; verify current API compatibility and Tyler platform integration status
agent_readiness.security_notes: Government asset management. SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US. Infrastructure and public works data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Government asset management. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Infrastructure and public works data.
